title: Crunchy Bitter Uruguayan Vegetable Skewers
description: A flavorful and crunchy Uruguayan dish featuring bitter vegetables, seasoned rice vinegar, and a satvik-friendly approach, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the cauliflower, broccoli, carrots, and red bell pepper to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 12-15 minutes, turning occasionally, until the vegetables are tender and lightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of quinoa or brown rice for a filling dinner.
